reasoning: The main focus is to improve Koren's lactate clearance and fatigue resistance by targeting the 9.3% drop from 5-min to 20-min power. This session, drawing insights from the last ride's intensity, will enhance aerobic endurance and prepare Koren for the sustained effort on the Alpine Loop's key climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 5 sets of 6-min over-unders: 3-min at 242W, 3-min at 218W. 1-min easy spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
